topStories.description: US Defence Secretary cites combat rescue tradition, but similarities to a famous movie monologue raise questions amid wider TrumpPope tensions

topStories.title: No date set for US-Iran talks, as Pakistan pushes to keep diplomacy alive
topStories.description: Pakistan's prime minister and army chief are both travelling to key players in the war, attempting to keep talks going.

topStories.title: Everything we like is a psyop
topStories.description: If culture is shaped by TikTok's algorithmic feed, then it's time for us to decide where we draw the line between necessary marketing and inauthentic growth hacking.

topStories.title: Priyanka Gandhi warns move towards delimitation is an ‘open attack on democracy’
topStories.description: The women’s quota could be implemented now, the Congress leader says, accusing the Union government of using the Constitution amendment to reshape political representation

topStories.title: Watch: Delimitation row erupts in Parliament: What happened? | Above the Fold | 16.04.2026
topStories.description: In our new and third episode of Above the Fold, we look at the stormy session in the Lok Sabha as the Centre and Opposition clash over delimitation. Joshua Landis weighs in on the escalating West Asia conflict, while Donald Trump sparks controversy with a viral post. Also, a key Supreme Court of India observation on voting rights and R Vaishali clinches a major chess title.

topStories.title: US general clarifies Iranian ports under blockade, not Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: A US general had to clarify that the US military is only blockading Iranian ports, not the entire Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Two Americans sentenced for helping North Korea steal $5 million in fake IT worker scheme
topStories.description: The U.S. Department of Justice announced that two Americans were sentenced to years in prison for helping the North Korean government place fake IT workers in U.S. companies.

topStories.title: AI traffic to US retailers rose 393% in Q1, and it’s boosting their revenue too
topStories.description: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

topStories.title: Syria takes control of all bases where US forces were deployed
topStories.description: Final convoy of US soldiers and equipment departs Qasrak air base in the northeastern governorate of Hasakah.

topStories.title: Google adds Nano Banana-powered image generation to Gemini’s Personal Intelligence
topStories.description: The feature will be initially available to paid users in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: On the Sabarimala temple entry case
dailyNews.description: As a Supreme Court Bench examines the broader implications of its 2018 Sabarimala ruling, the case prompts a look into the evolution of the essential religious practice doctrine, role of the State and the judiciary in religious reform, and the arguments over whether Ayyappa followers qualify as a religious denomination

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, talks to begin on lasting peace
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said the ceasefire would begin at 5 p.m. EST and was aimed at creating space for broader peace negotiations.

dailyNews.title: US strike on Pacific vessel kills three
dailyNews.description: US military footage released Wednesday shows its latest strike on a vessel in the eastern Pacific, killing three people.

dailyNews.title: US weighs executive order requiring banks to collect citizenship data, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says
dailyNews.description: “And I don’t think it’s unreasonable, because why don’t we have information on who’s in our banking system?” Bessent said.

dailyNews.title: Priyanka Gandhi sees Amit Shah ‘laughing’ during women quota speech, says ‘Chanakya aaj agar zinda hote...’
dailyNews.description: Not missing a beat, Congress MP Priyanka Gandhi paused her Lok Sabha address to point out Union Home Minister Amit Shah “laughing” during her remarks. Here's what she said next.

dailyNews.title: FIFA ‘surprised’ by US backlash as transport costs skyrocket at World Cup
dailyNews.description: Both a top US lawmaker and the governor of New Jersey ask FIFA to pay World Cup transport bill amid ticket hikes.

dailyNews.title: TCS case: Supreme Court moved, plea seeks to classify 'forced religious conversion' as 'terrorist act'
dailyNews.description: BJP leader Ashwini Kumar Upadhyay filed a plea in the Supreme Court requesting measures against alleged religious conversions and sexual harassment at a TCS office in Nashik, following claims from eight female employees. The plea urges the establishment of special courts.

dailyNews.title: Tariff refund portal to be launched soon – How, when to claim refunds? All FAQs answered
dailyNews.description: The portal is set to launch days after the US Supreme Court – in February this year – ruled that tariffs imposed under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act were illegal, potentially leaving the government owing businesses as much as $175 billion

dailyNews.title: White House Shrugs Off Shaky Economy as War Exceeds Trump’s Timeline
dailyNews.description: Stocks may be soaring again, but the war in Iran has started to pinch the finances of many Americans.

dailyNews.title: Jesus Memes, Threats and a War in Iran: A Portrait of Trump Under Pressure
dailyNews.description: President Trump has lashed out at enemies, allies and even the pope, and made it harder for Republicans to keep the focus on economic issues in a midterm election year.

dailyNews.title: RFK Jr. to Reform Health Panel That Determines Which Screenings Insurers Cover
dailyNews.description: The health secretary said he would reform the panel, which determines whether insurance will cover preventive services like mammograms and colonoscopies.

dailyNews.title: Yale Report Finds Colleges Deserve Blame for Higher Education’s Problems
dailyNews.description: A 10-member committee offered a brutal assessment of academia’s role in creating the forces challenging American colleges and universities.

topStories.description: In a setback for federal efforts to thwart climate litigation, the judge ruled that the suit, which tried to block the state from suing oil companies, was too speculative.

topStories.description: Few Republicans have been willing to distance themselves from the president as the war's end remains uncertain.

topStories.title: Trump announces Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
topStories.description: President Trump says Israel and Lebanon will enter a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington, D.C. dailyNews.title: Federal judge blocks above-ground White House ballroom construction
dailyNews.description: But underground construction work on a presidential bunker underneath the ballroom can continue, the judge said.

dailyNews.title: California high court orders disbarring of former Trump attorney over effort to dispute 2020 election results
dailyNews.description: John Eastman, who advised Trump on contesting the 2020 election, was disbarred by the California Supreme Court over findings of deceitful conduct.

dailyNews.title: GOP zeros in on South Texas Dem who urged Trump to 'allow people to cross freely'
dailyNews.description: Republicans say Rep. Vicente Gonzalez is vulnerable in his redrawn South Texas district due to his record on border security and immigration policies.

dailyNews.title: Jackson publicly airs grievances with conservative colleagues over Trump-era rulings
dailyNews.description: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson criticizes the Supreme Court's shadow docket, saying emergency orders often benefiting Trump erode public trust.

dailyNews.title: NOT BLUFFING: Stephen Miller says Trump is directly involved, 'holds all of the cards' in Iran negotiations
dailyNews.description: Stephen Miller says Trump is directly involved in Iran negotiations, calling the U.S. blockade a move "resetting the entire global order."

dailyNews.title: Hegseth excoriates media, likening them to ‘Pharisees’ in Trump defense
dailyNews.description: Pete Hegseth ripped the media, likening them to biblical Pharisees who explained away goodness, amid the Iran ceasefire during Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: House rejects Democrat attempt to limit Trump's Iran war powers
dailyNews.description: House Republicans blocked Democrats' war powers resolution aimed at halting the U.S. military campaign against Iran as Trump said the conflict is nearly over.

dailyNews.title: '60 Minutes' accused of using left-leaning Cardinals to bait Trump into feud with Vatican
dailyNews.description: CBS's "60 Minutes" accused of airing left-leaning segment critics say was designed to bait a conflict between President Donald Trump and Pope Leo XIV.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel, Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says Israeli and Lebanese officials have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire beginning Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
